hooks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NonInteractive -Command "$f = '${file_path}'; if ($f -match '\.ps1$') { $e = $null; [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile($f, [ref]$null, [ref]$e) | Out-Null; if ($e.Count -gt 0) { Write-Error ('PS parse errors in ' + $f + ': ' + ($e | ForEach-Object { $_.Message }) -join ', '); exit 1 } else { Write-Host ('PS parse OK: ' + $f) } } else { exit 0 }"
